column2: content
Got banned permanently. Terrible support.
Pay pay pay. If you don't you will only get to swipe on like 8-10 people in 24 hrs.
Hey, mind not deleting my review. I don't want to have to swipe through constant liberals. Update since 2/21/21 I was banned for my review.

Not a good idea, the app is really bad at finding matches, theyll bann you over saying anything they think is intrusive and wont tell you why! the girls are all gold diggers, I had over 74 chats open (male suit model) and they are all predators, theyre attention hungey so they post half naked photos and you cant have a intelligent conversation with Ny of them because they delete the app after or won't see you unless your paying for a steak lol, hinge is money hungry too don't download trust me!!
All fake
They're right that it's the app meant to be deleted. Because all there is are scammers and cat fishers and bot accounts, and you'll get frustrated and delete the useless app.
No matches
not great in places with smaller populations
Having used a few dating apps over the years I'm astounded by how many fake accounts/bots/scams there are on this specific app. Don't know what they need to do to fix it, but WOW. Really bad.
Never any match's during the time I had the app

Banned me after a week of use over 3 years ago. I don't even remember actually using the app, just creating an account. Go to try again and the first thing that pops up is you've been banned. Thanks. I don't feel like changing my number just to start dating again. 👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼

I shouldn't have to change my default browser just so the app can use a buggy captcha service. See error below: Unable to process request due to missing initial state. This may happen if browser sessionStorage is inaccessible or accidentally cleared. Some specific scenarios are - 1) Using IDP-Initiated SAML SSO. 2) Using signInWithRedirect in a storage-partitioned browser environment.
Notifications don't come through, I can't look at any of my messages... the bugs have become quite frustrating.

The app has stopped loading my messages. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling but it did not fix the issue. I also tried restarting my phone. Kind of a useless app if you can't see or reply to any messages.
Awful app. They give you 8 chances to swipe right per day unless you upgrade to the subscription plan for $50/month. Don't waste your time or money

Scam app,gold diggers, scam accounts, bots, and thots. That's it. Also, I reported someone for extreme violence and abuse, they sent an email they banned them. I unfortunately have proof they did not. I had to go and delete their account. Customer service is full of BS. Do not give them a single dollar of your money.
Have to uninstall and reinstall multiple times a day to get around the white blank screen when loading. No other way around other than rebooting phone.
I paid the for subscription to be banned a day later....didn't do anything inappropriate...what a scam

It's been about two years since I've used it but the experience has significantly gotten worse. There's more options but it's all so monetized and paywalled that it just feels like it there's no point using it. They're motto is that it's the dating app made to be deleted and right now it's pretty true but in the wrong ways. It's designed to keep you on as long as possible to get you to buy the subscription. I'd say don't bother or get off the app before you're sucked in.

Sucks. I tried logging in an it doesn't work. I have an email verifying that I logged in with Facebook but if I try, it says its wrong. If I try using my number, that doesn't work either wether I'm logging in tried creating a new acc.
Small amount of likes per day and locks all the people you would actually like behind roses(paywall).
More filters should be available for free. Especially one that filters out inactive accounts.
No success

The number of accounts advertising "adult services" is simply astounding. I guess if you're looking for a cheap escort for the night this is a good place to start. If you're looking for real people stick to other apps.

The "standouts" are obviously photo shopped faces. I've paid for a month and 12 roses. I have had zero responses from even one person. I whole heartedly believe none of these women I find attractive are even real people. This app is a money grab for sure. The app says it 'learns what I like' but in fact the only people that don't suffer from obesity are in the 'standouts' which clearly have an unmistakable "circle" around the face of an image.
The UI is very frustrating to use and it only matches with gross people
I think this app is not at all working !

Designed to be deleted. Yes indeed because they'll ban you for no reason and now you've got no use of the app. Was my fav dating app for the fact that you can actually see the people that like you, even had deleted my acc in other apps. Out the blue I get banned, have no idea why and nothing that can be done. Back to their competition I go. Seems like it's a very common issue other have had.
pathetic i didn't like it

They push a lot of profiles that are old and not active, also a lot of scammers on there which are not moderated proactively. I have other dating apps and was thinking of subscribing to Hinge but it's not worth it in my opinion. You can only pay for a subscription through Google Pay too which you have to setup (with a payment method there) if you haven't already.

**Trigger Warning: SA Promoted by Hinge staff. Hinge will ignore your selected preferences and instead show you sexes/genders you did not select. They do not care if you are a victim of SA by one of these sexes/genders. If you report the profiles that masquerade their profiles as the incorrect sexes/genders, Hinge staff will ban your account for report misuse. This app is run by awful, disgusting people.

Even as a HingeX subscriber who lives in a major city like Chicago, it's taken me 6 months to get a total of 13 likes and precisely zero dates. Meanwhile, I can get thousands of likes on Tinder in a single month and I have met many people from Tinder. What's the malfunction, Hinge? Your subscription sucks, and your likes system is right down there with it. Sad.

Absolutely pointless had it for weeks and not a single like match or conversation with anyone and it's not cause how I look cause I'm a solid 7-8/10 looks wise and I get likes matches messages on every other dating app bar this one haha yeah the dating app designed to be deleted hahaha yeah deleted cause it's garbage, use tinder or POF or hell anything other than this useless joke of a so called dating app you couldn't pay me to re download this

This is app is just a hustle. Most of the profiles are fake, seeking validation or looking for a new baby daddy. The matches I got had horrible communication skills or were flakes. The answers on prompts are silly and make zero sense. If people don't pay, they don't see your likes or comments. Most women of course, don't. Last, most profiles are hidden from guys over 45. I changed my age and the flood gates opened. By limiting choices, it keeps the ones who tend to have money around longer.
Too complicated
Lol deff designed to be deleted tired of false advertising as free if u arnt gonna let anyone talk to another human being for free then it isn't free should be illegal to false advertise like that.
I have to pay to like someone's picture right after downloading it? No thanks
Been logged in then asked to constantly log in over and over again only to go to delete my own account and instead it blocks me

stupidly hoped it would be less villainous than the other two extorts Bumb and Tind. Its WORSE, they escalated it. the super likes are £3 each, the subscription is a whopping £35p/m AND you only get about 7-8 swipes/likes before it locks for a full day. These people know we cant oay for a year to bring it SlIGHTLY down, as then we have to commit to not meeting anyone for that to be better value. Nah f.u. Hinge. 🖕🤮💩

All my "matches" are scammers. None of my matches were legitimate, all scammers! This app needs to screen these people, seriously. I thought this app was different, built better. Instead, it's overrun with fake profiles just like all the rest. Thanks for nothing, Hinge! Do not waste your time or money on this app!
Don't pay for this at all! Nobody does and it's very expensive and there are not that many people on the platform. I'm going to have a hard time getting my money back.

Garbage app. E-mailed the support team several times about an individual that is a seriel user and charlatan - ("made to be deleted"? ) and put my own health at risk and likely other female members too. Hinge hasn't had the decency to reply beyond a generic intial response and has no care for user safety. Appalling, and now a concern for the police.
Useless and time waste
Too complicated. I should be able to set a distance to travel. Should not have to pay. Site sucks. Will never be back. Just as bad as e harmony
Many issues logging in
Every time I click to change my preferences, the app closes. Sony Experia handset.

Since the last update I can only use the app one time before it goes to a white screen and has to be reinstalled. Took a star away. I have to uninstall and reinstall to continue conversations everytime I leave the app.
have to pay for most things, including liking. its also extremely expensive, the cheapest is $144.99 for a year?!?!

I tried to login and I have my phone number. I got the verification code and entered it. Then, because I got a new phone, you are asking for an email verification code. I can't use that email currently. This is idiotic that I have to put two separate codes in when the one is directly linked to my phone number I have had for 10 years. You lost a customer. I'll go to the other dating apps that have less problems to get on them. Now that I read the reviews there are not many good ones. Anyways.
I keep trying to sign up an account. It send a verification code that I type in but it won't proceed then.
Doesn't load. Stuck on a blank white screen.
App is not opening. have to install n uninstall it again n again!! Would appreciate if this problem is fixed

girls ladies females have no interest or intentions of meeting up. reply one liners. if they reply at all. app gives u 5 to 10 swipes a day 24hr period window. so if you get a match ask them out on the first line. or just do yourself a favor and delete the app. save yourself the hassle misery of thinking they are serious about dating or wanting to get to know you. this is just entertaining outlet for them to read your profile and make fun of your messages and talk shiz to the other girlfriends
"Preferred members go on twice as many dates." Hey guys, double zero is still zero. That's math. App no longer works. Loads a white screen and nothing else.
I keep receiving ads from this BS app everywhere and can't seem to remove it. I tried everything but it keeps popping up.

So I start by giving my number, and then get a code. I put in the code. At this point they somehow magically got my e-mail, and note I never had an account on this app nor given them my e-mail yet. Now they say there is an e-mail at my actual correct e-mail, which they somehow got. No e-mail there in inbox or junk even after a while. I'm stuck at creating an account. I deleted the app and came to leave this review. Utter trash app.
nobody likes me
Banned for no reason...lmfao what a joke,haven't matches or talked to anyone in like almost 2 weeks
the app won't even open up anymore
Banned for absolutely no reason lol. I deleted the app for three weeks, and come back to a banned profile. This is unreal.
If you want an app that includes loads of fake accounts (scammer) to increase popularity.
Horrible customer service, total lack of support when you have a problem with the app. Plus they delete your profile without any notification.

*update customer service is still awful* This rating is due to customer service. I have now had 2 accounts be deleted and I have yet to get an answer from customer service as to why. If you have to pick an app use tinder or bumble or even craigslist and you'll get better help I'm sure! I do not understand how they can justify banning accounts without giving any reason. Terrible customer service
Once they figure out the people you like and are compatible with they will separate them from the free portion and make you pay to interact with the people you are more compatible with.

Requires class action lawsuit! Hinge owned by tinder. Get banned on one you're banned on all. Why were you banned? Can't tell you!! These apps all have fake accounts, and cheating exes who are revenge reporting you!!! Match. You're enabling abuse with your absurd "community guidelines". I am a victim!

Latest update, Jan 2024, has broken the app for me. Unless I clear cache to force a new login session I just get a blank white screen when I open the app. Needs rolling back imo. I was close to paying for hinge+ to start the new year but now I won't, I'd be gutted if I paid then could even open the app.
Super negative first experience, wasted $65
I am unable to register myself from last 3 days because i didn't get my otp on EMail what the fcuk is going on by you guys
hate the paywall fees
Basically a scam. Ridiculously overpriced even though it's the worst dating app. Avoid this app and its awful creators. 0/10 do not recommend
Terrible app

Account was banned for no reason. Nevermind the bots on this app though. Don't bother trying to appeal either. You will just get a generic response that you "violated terms & conditions." They won't tell you, so what type of appeal process is that?
App has become like other greedy dating apps, but even worse. 5 likes and it prompts you're out of likes? Are you kidding me?
not many people in my area, matches just want a fwb or hookup
Blocked me right as I got my account, totally not worth downloading..all they want is money.
Weird restrictions
Worst experience...
Yeah this app is garbage
This app is a joke and dating is an absolute joke at this point.
haven't found any love
Worst dating app ever . Waste of time waste of money .

They will ban you, not explain why, make appealing impossible, and tell you the decisiom is final. Dont waste your time or money. I tried to explain to them my account was compromised. They do not care. Alos its the same company that monopolizes the other apps like tinder

Latest updates don't work when connected to wifi. The app loads with white screen and just sits there. No I'm not turning off my firewall, all other apps work but not yours so are you trying to do dodgy stuff in the background? Also seems to be a lot more fake accounts these days....

In 2021 I was going to set up a profile on hinge. I had an issue with them requiring a telephone number. Here we are 2024 I decided to give them the benefit of the doubt. I set up my profile to find out that you cannot see local people in your area unless you pay first. That is disgusting and despicable. Don't waste your time do not bother setting up a profile.

You took money off wrong card. Please put back. And cancel subscription. Why would you do that. It wasn't due until the 28th on the other card. Plus all I saw was bi's , trans, men no lesbians! I'm a lesbian who wants same.!!!!
This app is obsolete. Nothing works! Just take it off the store already!
Couldn't even make a profile. Glitches non functioning app
Broken phone verification. Impossible to progress with the code. No-one s testing this app
At first it working soo good.but suddenly my account got banned... And it says that I am under 18.although I am 19+ .I have such a bad experience from hitch

After closing the app, I can no longer restart the app, I get a white screen that never goes away. I have to clear the app data every time I try to open it and relogin. Im also not getting notifications even though I re-enable the setting every time I clear the data.
Just a blank page. Tried reinstalling, looks the same, unusable, membershio is expensive and useless.
this is the same as all the other dating apps... here's all the things that you can do and people that you can meet... if you pay.
Just another useless dating site where nothing ever happens. I paid for the premium, liked plenty of girls but absolutely not a thing came back the other way, full of timewasters that aren't serious.
Crashes when you try to upload a picture.
After six months or so of use I got banned for no reason and with no clear explanation, can't make a new account
I got a match and I was texting with her but when I have come out of the app, I couldn't find the chat. What is happening?

There's a Glitch where when you go to send a message, it won't send right away but after hitting send several times it'll count it as liking multiple people so I've run out of likes after. Liking one profile

Having an issue on joining.... Use Facebook to auto fill no worries but when get to section where u choose your gender it says u must make a selection but no where to make a selection and can't move on so stuck there
Logged me out and wouldn't allow me to sign back in.
